headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) After Its Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: Wondering if Bristol-Myers Squibb at around US$58 a share still offers value, or if the easy gains are already behind it? This breakdown is built to help you answer that for yourself. The stock has returned 0.7% over the last 7 days, is down 1.7% over 30 days, but sits at 8.6% year to date and 22.0% over 1 year, while the 3 year and 5 year returns sit at a 5.0% decline and 7.5% respectively. Recent price moves are set against ongoing attention on Bristol-Myers Squibb's pipeline, patent cycle...
